summary: Iteration 86 - Subscription Feature Gating Audit Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for Trial plan: Export PDF button gold/enabled, REDD+ widget visible with data, SSRTE widget visible with data, ICI remediation visible, Charts section visible, Quick Actions panel shows MRV REDD+ and SSRTE/ICI links. Subscription plans correctly defined with proper feature gating.

issues: Console warning: recharts width/height -1 on initial render (cosmetic, charts render correctly after)
Console warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component (React setState warning)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-kpis returns correct features based on subscription plan
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard-charts returns features dict and gates data correctly
PASS: GET /api/cooperative/pdf/dashboard-report requires export_pdf_excel feature (403 without)
PASS: GET /api/coop-subscriptions/plans returns all plans with correct features
PASS: GET /api/coop-subscriptions/my-subscription returns features for cooperative user (403 for admin)
PASS: Trial plan (coop_trial) has Pro-level access: dashboard_complet=True, redd_avance=True, export_pdf_excel=True
PASS: Starter plan (coop_starter) correctly limited: dashboard_complet=False, export_pdf_excel=False, redd_avance=False
PASS: Starter plan has: rapports_ars1000=True, alertes_ssrte=True, redd_simplifie=True
PASS: Features consistent between dashboard-kpis and dashboard-charts endpoints
PASS: Frontend Export PDF button gold/enabled for Trial plan
PASS: Frontend REDD+ Widget visible with data (Score 4.9, 17 visits, 18 producteurs)
PASS: Frontend SSRTE Widget visible with data (18 visits, 20 enfants, 80% couverture)
PASS: Frontend ICI Remediation section visible (7 cas, 3 resolus, 2 en cours)
PASS: Frontend Charts section 'Analyses & Tendances' visible
PASS: Frontend Quick Actions panel shows MRV REDD+ link (redd_avance=True)
PASS: Frontend Quick Actions panel shows SSRTE/ICI link (alertes_ssrte=True)
PASS: Subscription banner shows 'Essai Gratuit Pro' with 179 days remaining
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 86 verified subscription feature gating for cooperative plans. Trial plan has full Pro access (6 months free). Starter plan is limited (no export_pdf_excel, no redd_avance, no rapports_ssrte_ici). The my-subscription endpoint only works for cooperative user_type (admin gets 403). Dashboard-kpis and dashboard-charts endpoints return features dict for frontend gating. PDF export endpoint requires export_pdf_excel feature. All UI elements correctly show/hide based on subscription features.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

ssrte_widget.starter_state: visible with data (alertes_ssrte=True), no ICI section
